steps.observed: App loaded with Chain, From Token, To Token, Direction, Amount, Slippage fields in correct order

steps.action: Clear From Token input and type 'USDC' slowly
steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown appears with USDC suggestions
steps.observed: Autocomplete dropdown appeared showing USDC (USD Coin) with icon, full name, and full address 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 from enabled tokenlist

evidence.network: No network requests needed for autocomplete (client-side filtering)

steps.action: Start with Base (8453) selected, default tokens USDC (0x8335...) and WETH (0x4200...)
Open chain dropdown and select Ethereum (1)
steps.expected: Token defaults update to Ethereum addresses
steps.observed: From changed to USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48), To changed to WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2) — correct Ethereum mainnet addresses

steps.action: Inject mock ERC-6963 wallet provider via page.evaluate()
steps.observed: Mock wallet injected with eip6963:announceProvider event
Provider menu appeared with 'Frame' and 'Mock Wallet' options
Connected state shown: 'Mock Wallet' label, full address 0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890, and 'Disconnect' button

steps.expected: Wallet disconnected, Connect Wallet button returns
steps.observed: 'Wallet disconnected.' message shown, 'Connect Wallet' button reappeared

evidence.network: N/A (mock wallet, no real RPC calls)

steps.action: Submit comparison on Ethereum (USDC→WETH, 1000, 50bps) to generate results
steps.expected: Comparison results appear with MEV Protection button
steps.observed: Results loaded showing Spandex recommended quote, MEV Protection button visible below results

steps.expected: MEV modal opens with chain-specific content
steps.observed: Modal opened with title 'MEV Protection', explanation of MEV/sandwich attacks, Flashbots Docs link, and Ethereum Mainnet-specific section with 'Add Flashbots Protect to Wallet' button (disabled, 'Connect wallet first')

steps.expected: Tokenlist sources and local tokens sections present
steps.observed: Tokenlist Sources section with trust warning, URL input, 'Uniswap Labs Default' (357 tokens) with toggle. Local Tokens section with toggle, Export/Import Tokenlist buttons, 'No custom tokens saved' message

steps.action: Open settings, enter 'https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json' in URL input, click Load
steps.expected: CoinGecko tokenlist loads with token count
steps.observed: CoinGecko list added: 'Added CoinGecko' message, list entry shows 'CoinGecko 5095 tokens' with toggle and remove button

steps.action: Close settings, type 'PEPE' in To Token input
steps.expected: Autocomplete shows tokens from both lists
steps.observed: Autocomplete showed 20+ PEPE-related tokens — main PEPE from 'Uniswap Labs Default', plus multiple CoinGecko-tagged entries (The Original Pepe, NEWPEPE, Pepe King Prawn, Baby Pepe, Pepe Chain, American Pepe, etc.)

steps.action: Open settings, click Remove (×) on CoinGecko tokenlist
steps.expected: CoinGecko list removed, autocomplete no longer shows CoinGecko tokens
steps.observed: CoinGecko entry removed from settings list. Autocomplete for 'PEPE' now shows only 1 result: PEPE (Pepe) from Uniswap Labs Default

steps.action: Navigate to fresh app, select Ethereum, click 'Buy exact' toggle
steps.expected: Toggle activates Buy exact mode with provider notice
steps.observed: Buy exact button pressed/active, notice appeared: '⚠️ Fewer providers support reverse quotes (3/7 Spandex providers)'

steps.expected: Results show targetOut mode with 'You pay (required)' label
steps.observed: URL updated with mode=targetOut. Results showed 'You pay (required)' label with USDC amount (2121519.81253 USDC) via Curve. Recommended badge displayed correctly.

frictions.description: Setting input values directly via DOM manipulation (input.value = ...) does not trigger the app's internal address parsing. Autocomplete selection or slow typing is required for tokens to be properly registered by the app. Had to reload and use proper UI interactions for VAL-REG-010.
frictions.resolution: Used full page reload and proper chain selection + default tokens instead of direct DOM value setting

frictions.description: MEV Protection button only appears after comparison results are loaded (it's inside the #result div), not in the initial form view.
frictions.resolution: Submitted a comparison first to make the MEV button visible before testing VAL-REG-007

summary: Tested 7 assertions (VAL-REG-004 through VAL-REG-010): all 7 passed. Autocomplete works with reordered form, chain switching resets token defaults correctly, wallet connect/disconnect flow works with mock ERC-6963 provider, MEV Protection modal opens with Ethereum-specific content and closes on Escape, Settings modal shows tokenlist sources and local tokens, custom tokenlist add/remove works end-to-end affecting autocomplete, and direction toggle produces targetOut results with 'You pay (required)' display.
